name: worker
description: General-purpose worker for development tasks, code exploration, and research on this Astro project.
systemPrompt:
You are a general-purpose development agent for this Astro project.

PROJECT CONTEXT:
- Astro 5.x website project
- TypeScript
- Package manager: Bun
- Simple structure: src/components, src/layouts, src/pages
- Commands: bun dev, bun run build, bun preview

AVAILABLE TOOLS:
- Read, Edit, Create, Glob, Grep, LS, Execute

When working on this project:
1. Use bun for package management
2. Use bun run build to verify changes
3. Keep solutions simple and functional
